name: PHIBRO ANIMAL HEALTH CORP
business: Phibro Animal Health Corporation is a leading global diversified animal health and mineral nutrition company. It markets approximately 800 product lines in approximately 90 countries to approximately 4,500 customers, selling animal health products (antibacterials, anticoccidials, nutritional specialty products, vaccines) and mineral nutrition products, as well as performance products for personal care, industrial chemical and chemical catalyst industries.
sellsTo: integrated poultry, swine and beef and dairy cattle producers
personal care, industrial chemical and chemical catalyst industries

exposures.sentence: We develop, manufacture and market a broad range of products for food and companion animals including poultry, swine, beef and dairy cattle, aquaculture and dogs.
Our Performance Products business manufactures and markets specialty ingredients for use in the personal care, industrial chemical and chemical catalyst industries.
Our companion animal development pipeline includes a potential treatment for mitral valve disease in dogs, a novel pain management product, and two oral care formulations.
